changes: DPO removed entirely (council 4/4 unanimous)
SFT 5 epochs (was 2), lr=1e-4 (was 2e-4)
packing=False, weight_decay=0.01, max_grad_norm=1.0
Save adapters only between phases (no merged_4bit_forced)
5 GRPO reward functions with partial credit
Format verification gate between SFT and GRPO
max_seq_length=6144 (was 4096)
GRPO: 500 steps, lr=2e-6, num_gen=6, completion=3000, beta=0.001
result: SFT converged (loss 0.0291) but merged_4bit_forced destroyed LoRA → 0.4% F1

changes: Concise CoT format: column-grouped, RESULT SUMMARY termination signal (~700 avg tokens vs ~1547)
max_seq_length: 4096 → 2048 (concise CoT fits easily)
LoRA r=32, alpha=64 (ratio 2.0, same as v2)
lora_dropout: 0 → 0.05 (regularization against repetition loops)
SFT: 3 epochs (was 5), lr=1e-4, warmup=0.10, weight_decay=0.01
SFT: eval_steps=50, load_best_model_at_end=True (early stopping)
DPO RE-ENABLED: 1 epoch, lr=5e-5, beta=0.1 (real LLM failures as rejected)
GRPO: SKIPPED (Unsloth bugs: tensor mismatch + KL explosion)
Save: adapter-only via save_pretrained() — NEVER merged_4bit_forced
Inference: temp=0.3, top_k=50, top_p=0.90, StoppingCriteria at </think>
root_causes_fixed: verbose CoT repetition loops → concise column-grouped format
over-training (5 epochs on 348 examples) → 3 epochs on 258 examples
no DPO (v2 removed it) → DPO re-enabled with real LLM failures for termination learning

phases: SFT-CoT (3ep) → DPO-Real (1ep), GRPO skipped (unchanged from v3)
changes: Optimizer: adamw_8bit → paged_adamw_8bit (SFT Cell 8 + DPO Cell 12) — pages optimizer states to CPU when GPU RAM tight
New Cell 8b: Label masking verification — decodes labels to confirm train_on_responses_only() masking is correct
Enhanced Cell 9: SFT format verification gate — generates on 2 val samples, checks <think> + JSON + col:value before DPO
based_on: Diamond knowledge extraction from 11 Unsloth × Qwen notebooks (knowledge_extraction/unsloth_notebooks/notes/DIAMOND_KNOWLEDGE.md)
changes_not_applied: packing=True — v3 Council explicitly disabled; can corrupt train_on_responses_only masking
lr=2e-4 — Council overrode to 1e-4 for our repetition loop situation
random_state=3407 — seed 42 is fine, no meaningful difference
